description: mcp-server: replace mock read/write/exec with real filesystem ops + sandboxing

Added test_pipeline_executor.py covering PipelineStage, CRUD, statistics, execution
Fixed TS compilation bugs: abstract async modifiers, missing think/act implementations, untracked intervals, capabilities type mismatch, Record type for merged object

Added test_mesh_workflows.py: pre-built workflow constants, content creation/research pipelines, add_task_to_pipeline_stage, connection broadcast edge cases, task execution error handling
